taxonomy: Campanopsis graminifolia is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Campanulaceae. It is an annual or biennial herb native to Asia and Europe. The species is classified in the genus Campanopsis, which is a part of the family Campanulaceae. The classification of Campanopsis graminifolia is further supported by its characteristics, such as its bell-shaped flowers and grass-like leaves. The specific classification of Campanopsis graminifolia can be expressed in a hierarchical manner as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Clade - Angiosperms, Clade - Eudicots, Clade - Asterids, Order - Asterales, Family - Campanulaceae, Genus - Campanopsis, Species - C. graminifolia.
